content.content:
<gap:target id="deactivate-user-endpoint">
      <gap:target id="deactivate-user-method">PATCH</gap:target>
      <gap:target id="deactivate-user-path">/users/{id}/deactivate</gap:target>
      @router.patch("/{user_id}/deactivate", response_model=UserResponse)
      def deactivate_user_endpoint(user_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
          user = get_user(db, user_id)
          user.is_active = False
          db.commit()
          db.refresh(user)
          return user
    </gap:target>
